MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ILONA BRUSIL, ESQ., Tel No. 415-814-0573 appearing for the moving party;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Court conducts an unreported in camera hearing with attorney Ilona Brusil. Matter submitted. The Court rules as follows: Attorney Ilona Brusil's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Jesus Fabia Zamora is granted, the court finding sufficient grounds. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
